meta.description: Character seed data for gacha data platform. Inspired by otome gacha games.

portrait_spec.style: anime portrait, bust shot, clean background, otome game card art
portrait_spec.notes: Use WebP over PNG — 50-70% smaller at same quality. 3:4 portrait ratio matches gacha card shape. 21 portraits × ~50KB = ~1MB total, safe for git.

characters.name: Shen Yexiao
characters.description: Youngest CEO of Yexiao Group. Speaks in quarterly reports. Has never smiled in a board meeting — or anywhere else.

visual.prompt_hint: Sharp jawline, silver-white hair slicked back, steel-grey eyes, black tailored three-piece suit, cold piercing gaze, ice-blue accent lighting

characters.name: Wen Junhai
characters.description: Chief surgeon who talks to his plants. Prescribes herbal tea for everything, including heartbreak.

visual.prompt_hint: Soft features, warm brown eyes, dark green hair loosely tied back, white doctor's coat over sage turtleneck, gentle smile, soft natural lighting with leaf shadows

characters.name: Xiao Ling
characters.description: Commander of the Vanguard Division. Sleeps in full armor. Once punched a door open because the handle was broken.

visual.prompt_hint: Strong build, jet-black hair with undercut, golden eyes, dark ornate military armor with lightning motifs, battle scar across left cheek, intense commanding stare

characters.name: Rei Kurosawa
characters.description: Reclusive painter whose exhibitions sell out in minutes. No one has seen his face — only his hands in interviews.

visual.prompt_hint: Half-face obscured by shadow, one visible deep violet eye, messy ink-black hair falling over face, paint-stained fingers, black turtleneck, moody purple-grey atmosphere

characters.name: Nox
characters.description: Online handle only. Real name unknown. Once crashed a government firewall to prove a point about password hygiene.

visual.prompt_hint: Androgynous features, electric blue streaks in white messy hair, heterochromia (one neon green, one amber), oversized hoodie, glowing holographic HUD reflections on face, smirk

characters.name: Liu Haoyang
characters.description: National swim team hopeful. Brings protein shakes to dates. Cries at sports anime.

visual.prompt_hint: Tanned skin, bright orange-brown hair, warm amber eyes, wide genuine grin, red-white athletic jacket unzipped, towel around neck, golden sunlight

characters.name: Kael
characters.description: Twitch partner, rank 1 in three games simultaneously. Lives on energy drinks and spite.

visual.prompt_hint: Pale skin, messy purple-black hair, sharp teal eyes with dark circles underneath, gaming headset around neck, black graphic tee, LED glow on face, cocky half-smile

characters.name: Aldric Vaughn
characters.description: Literature professor who quotes Byron mid-lecture. Students attend for the voice, stay for the poetry.

visual.prompt_hint: Refined features, ash-blond wavy hair, deep blue eyes behind round gold-rimmed glasses, ivory dress shirt with rolled sleeves, holding a book, warm library lighting

characters.name: Milo Chen
characters.description: Shoots on film only. Has 200k followers but posts once a month. Wears the same jacket in every photo.

visual.prompt_hint: Sharp cheekbones, dark brown undercut hair, calm dark eyes, vintage film camera hanging from neck, oversized olive bomber jacket, urban rooftop background, golden hour

characters.name: Soren
characters.description: Runs the old district library. Knows where every book is by memory. Whispers even outside the library.

visual.prompt_hint: Delicate features, long platinum hair in low ponytail, pale green eyes, cream cardigan over white collared shirt, books in background, soft diffused window light, serene expression

characters.name: Lucien Blanc
characters.description: French-trained pastry chef. Names every soufflé. Takes personal offense when someone doesn't finish dessert.

visual.prompt_hint: Soft curly honey-blond hair, bright hazel eyes, flour dusted on cheek, white chef's coat with rolled sleeves, warm smile, warm bakery lighting with golden tones

characters.name: Dante Kai
characters.description: Second-best swordsman in the academy. Trains at 4am to overtake rank 1. Respectful rival energy.

visual.prompt_hint: Athletic build, dark red hair tied in high ponytail, fierce amber eyes, navy kendo uniform slightly open at collar, wooden sword resting on shoulder, dawn training ground lighting

characters.name: Caspian Waves
characters.description: Lives in a van by the coast. Philosophizes about the ocean. Somehow always tan and never stressed.

visual.prompt_hint: Deep tan, sun-bleached sandy hair, relaxed sea-green eyes, open linen shirt, shell necklace, easy lazy smile, ocean sunset background with warm orange light

characters.name: Riku Tanaka
characters.description: Sits behind you in class. Leaves notes on your desk then denies it. Ears turn red when caught.

visual.prompt_hint: Youthful face, neat black hair with side part, flustered dark brown eyes looking away, school uniform with loosened tie, slight blush on ears, classroom window light

characters.name: Jay
characters.description: Remembers your order after one visit. Does latte art of your face. Refuses tips.

visual.prompt_hint: Warm brown skin, short curly dark hair, friendly brown eyes, brown apron over flannel shirt, holding a latte cup, cozy café warm lighting, easygoing smile

characters.name: Theo Park
characters.description: Breaks three beakers per semester. Accidentally brilliant. Apologizes to lab equipment.

visual.prompt_hint: Round face, messy dark brown hair sticking up, wide earnest eyes behind thick square glasses, lab coat slightly too big, safety goggles pushed up on forehead, fluorescent lab lighting

characters.name: Haruki
characters.description: Lives next door since age 5. Still climbs through your window instead of using the front door.

visual.prompt_hint: Boy-next-door look, warm brown hair slightly tousled, kind dark eyes, casual hoodie and jeans, carefree grin, soft afternoon light from a bedroom window

characters.name: Oliver Quinn
characters.description: Inherited the shop from his grandmother. Reads aloud to the store cat. Closes early if it rains.

visual.prompt_hint: Gentle face, dusty auburn hair, soft grey-green eyes, round tortoiseshell glasses, knit sweater vest over collared shirt, bookshelf background, warm lamplight, peaceful expression

characters.name: Kohaku
characters.description: Claims to be 300 years old. Steals your snacks and calls it a 'spiritual offering.' Tail appears when excited.

visual.prompt_hint: Fox ears peeking through golden-orange hair, mischievous amber-gold eyes with slit pupils, traditional kimono worn loosely, playful fanged grin, autumn leaves floating, warm mystical glow

characters.name: Zhen Wei
characters.description: Assigned to protect you. Takes it extremely literally. Once tackled a waiter who approached too fast.

visual.prompt_hint: Tall broad build, buzz-cut black hair, stern dark eyes scanning surroundings, black suit with earpiece, arms crossed, sharp jawline, overcast neutral lighting, no-nonsense expression

characters.name: Felix
characters.description: Delivers your packages personally. Trips on the last step every time. Somehow nothing ever breaks.

visual.prompt_hint: Freckled face, messy strawberry-blond hair windswept, bright green eyes, delivery uniform slightly disheveled, bandaid on nose, sheepish grin, outdoor daylight with motion blur feel

banners.name: Eternal Encounter
banners.description: Standard banner — all characters in pool
